历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 34604 → 38266 → 38902 → 50562 → 55007, showing a continuous backward trend; rankings fluctuated between 35,000 and 39,000 from 2021 to 2023, then significantly shifted backward to 50562 in 2024 (a backward shift of about 12,000 places), and continued to shift backward to 55007 in 2025 (a backward shift of about 4,445 places), with a cumulative backward shift of about 20,000 places over the past two years, and a baseline ranking of about 55,007 in 2025; the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 27 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 52 in 2024, 64 in 2025, and 95 in 2026; compared to 2025, the 2026 plan significantly expanded by 31 students, an expansion rate of about 48.4%, the largest expansion rate in recent years, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 137th, with a steady upward trend in recent years (from 170 in 2021 to 137 in 2026), indicating continuous improvement in overall strength; reputation was somewhat negative in 2022 (cafeteria and dormitory issues), but neutral/mixed in 2026 (library management response); Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 104th, comprehensive popularity 77370), with low short video exposure; no admission gaps or abnormal admission records, overall public opinion is stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, Chemistry, Food Science, etc.; social popularity in 2026 remains high for Computer Science, high for Electronic Information/Communication, high for Electrical Engineering and Automation, average/wait-and-see for Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials, and divided/wait-and-see for Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing; the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province was 205,920 in 2021, 320,192 in 2025, and 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4% from 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, in the northwest region, with relatively weak regional preference for Hunan examinees; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province expanded from 64 in 2025 to 95 in 2026, with an increased proportion, but overall it remains a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of the 2025 baseline ranking of 55,007, the significant expansion of about 48.4% in the 2026 plan which significantly alleviates competition, the increase of about 8.4% in the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province in 2026 which slightly intensifies competition, stable school reputation, average Douyin popularity, and no advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is: predicted minimum ranking approximately 70,896, with a range of 70,396–71,396.
